'''Opun "Black Hole" Mcgrrrr''' was the son of [[Hethra Mcgrrrr/Legends|Hethra Mcgrrrr]], the founder of the [[Black Hole Gang/Legends|Black Hole Pirates]]. He was also the former owner of the [[Holiday Towers Hotel and Casino|Holiday Towers]] hotel on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], though [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] later took control.

==Biography==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], as a revenge for Jabba's coup for the Holiday Towers, he stole the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[CZ-3/Legends|CZ-3]] while staying as a guest at [[Desilijic Complex/Legends|Jabba's town house]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. His intentions were to take revenge on Jabba by gaining access to the secrets hidden in the droid. However, Jabba had foreseen this eventuality, and CZ-3 was spying on Mcgrrrr. The entire operation turned out to be a sting operation set up by Jabba.<ref name="AJ11" />

This plan was foiled because the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Aguilae]] and her partner, the [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] [[Macemillian-winduarté]], stole the droid from him (or, as they would claim, found or bought it after it malfunctioned and went wild). Mcgrrrr, infuriated, sent his [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]] henchman [[Tols Vengra]] after the droid.<ref name="AJ11" />

Vengra found the droid at the same time that Jabba's bounty hunter [[Takeel/Legends|Takeel]] did. While they were arguing, Takeel's brother [[Zutton/Legends|Zutton]] shot and destroyed the droid. However, in the process, CZ-3 had provided Jabba with enough evidence to expose Mcgrrrr and Vengra's plots against Jabba.<ref name="AJ11" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Mcgrrrr's appearance was based on [[Declan Mulholland]], the actor who played a [[Heater (henchman)|Human version of Jabba the Hutt]] in a scene of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']]. Mulholland wore a similar costume in the movie [[Wikipedia:Time Bandits|''Time Bandits'']].
